sizing_rule.note: Recalculate optimal f using worst-case loss (W) derived from historical trades after deducting X dollars in commissions and slippage from each trade's P&L. Recompute arithmetic mean and population standard deviation on adjusted trade set, then apply Equation (3.34) with adjusted W variable (3.35) to determine contract count.

source_rule_text: Adjust position sizing calculations when commissions and slippage are incorporated by deducting X dollars from each trade's P&L before calculating arithmetic mean and standard deviation, then recalculate optimal f using the adjusted parameters.
